dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend a = todynamic(action) | extend TimeGenerated = todatetime(a['timestamp']), action_id_s = tostring(a['id']), agent_id_s = tostring(a['agent_id']), action_type_s = tostring(a['action_type']), resource_type_s = tostring(a['resource_type']), status_s = tostring(a['status']), severity_s = tostring(a['severity']), policy_id_s = tostring(a['policy_id']), policy_decision_s = tostring(a['policy_decision']), is_anomaly_b = tobool(a['is_anomaly']), anomaly_score_d = toreal(a['anomaly_score']), anomaly_reason_s = tostring(a['anomaly_reason']), log_hash_s = tostring(a['log_hash']) | project TimeGenerated, action_id_s, agent_id_s, action_type_s, resource_type_s, status_s, severity_s, policy_id_s, policy_decision_s, is_anomaly_b, anomaly_score_d, anomaly_reason_s, log_hash_s
